creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
>Tested and working also with seamonkey-2.6.1, contrarily to what is
>listed here:
>http://blog.getfirebug.com/2012/01/06/firebug-1-9-0/

And I'm happy about that, as it's my favorite!

>BTW, Barbara, I'm using firebug only rarely nowadays and with portscout
>RSS's down I'm slower noticing upgrades; if you'd like to maintain the
>port and be able to have faster updates, it's fine for me.

It's ok for me, even if they are growing in number :)

>PS: I used `make xpi-plist` instead of the patch in the PR, but it seems
>to be really identical, except a few lines re-ordered in order to
>minimize diff length.

Well, I patched it manually. I should remember to use it next time.
